title: Ο περί Επαρχιακών Συμβουλίων (Mejlisses Idare) Νόμος (ΚΕΦ.239)

provisions.title: Άρθρο 1: Short title
provisions.content: 1. This Law may be cited as the District Councils (Mejlisses Idare) Law.

provisions.title: Άρθρο 2: Composition of District Councils (Mejlisses Idare)
Άρθρο 3: Abolition of Central Mejlis Idare
provisions.content: 3. The Central Mejlis Idare is hereby abolished.

provisions.title: Άρθρο 4: District Council (Mejlis Idare) to be read for Mejlis Idare
provisions.content: 4. Whenever in any Law, public instrument or book or document whatsoever used in any Department, the words “Mejlis Idare of the Qaza” or “District Mejlis Idare” occur, the words “District Council (Mejlis Idare)” shall be read in place and stead thereof.
